pyqgis_plugin.name: TUFLOW Studio
pyqgis_plugin.description: TUFLOW project management: root paths, file editor, and run logs
pyqgis_plugin.about: Docked panel plugin for TUFLOW modellers with project folder tracking, control file editor with syntax checking, and run log extraction.
pyqgis_plugin.changelog: v1.2.2: TCF checker no longer flags Log Folder/Output Folder or paths with << >> variables as missing files v1.2.1: Removed Inputs tab; TCF checker now detects typos in IF/ELSE IF keyword (e.g. Scneario) v1.2.0: Editor now includes .bat files; file list grouped by extension; dock starts hidden by default
